parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
const channel = data.current_channel;

const directories = {
  apontador:{name:'Apontador',country:'BR',email:'cadastro@apontador.com.br',subject:'Solicitação de Cadastro/Atualização - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  guiamais:{name:'Guia Mais',country:'BR',email:'contato@guiamais.com.br',subject:'Inclusão de Empresa no Guia Mais - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  telelistas:{name:'Telelistas',country:'BR',email:'cadastro@telelistas.net',subject:'Cadastro Comercial - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  acheiaqui:{name:'Achei Aqui',country:'BR',email:'contato@acheiaqui.com.br',subject:'Solicitação de Cadastro - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  saipos:{name:'Saipos',country:'BR',email:'comercial@saipos.com',subject:'Cadastro de Estabelecimento - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  encontrabrasil:{name:'Encontra Brasil',country:'BR',email:'cadastro@encontrabrasil.com.br',subject:'Inclusão no Guia Comercial - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  guiasp:{name:'Guia SP',country:'BR',email:'cadastro@guiasp.com.br',subject:'Cadastro de Empresa - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  ifood:{name:'iFood',country:'BR',email:'restaurantes@ifood.com.br',subject:'Parceria Comercial - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  rappi:{name:'Rappi',country:'BR',email:'restaurantes@rappi.com.br',subject:'Cadastro de Restaurante - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  getninjas:{name:'GetNinjas',country:'BR',email:'profissionais@getninjas.com.br',subject:'Cadastro de Profissional/Empresa - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  habitissimo:{name:'Habitissimo',country:'BR',email:'profissionais@habitissimo.com.br',subject:'Cadastro Profissional - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  vivareal:{name:'Viva Real',country:'BR',email:'anunciantes@vivareal.com.br',subject:'Cadastro de Anunciante - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  zapimoveis:{name:'ZAP Imóveis',country:'BR',email:'anuncie@zapimoveis.com.br',subject:'Cadastro Imobiliária - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  doctoralia:{name:'Doctoralia',country:'BR',email:'medicos@doctoralia.com.br',subject:'Cadastro Profissional de Saúde - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  consultaremedios:{name:'Consulta Remédios',country:'BR',email:'farmacias@consultaremedios.com.br',subject:'Cadastro de Farmácia - {name}',language:'pt-BR'},
  booking:{name:'Booking.com',country:'GLOBAL',email:'partner.help@booking.com',subject:'Property Registration - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  tripadvisor:{name:'TripAdvisor',country:'GLOBAL',email:'ownercenter@tripadvisor.com',subject:'Business Listing Request - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  bing:{name:'Bing Places',country:'GLOBAL',email:'placesfeedback@microsoft.com',subject:'Business Listing Submission - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  here:{name:'HERE WeGo',country:'GLOBAL',email:'mapfeedback@here.com',subject:'Business Location Update - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  tomtom:{name:'TomTom',country:'GLOBAL',email:'places@tomtom.com',subject:'Place Update Request - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  waze:{name:'Waze',country:'GLOBAL',email:'support@waze.com',subject:'Business Listing - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  mapquest:{name:'MapQuest',country:'GLOBAL',email:'feedback@mapquest.com',subject:'Business Data Update - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  yelp:{name:'Yelp',country:'GLOBAL',email:'restaurantsupport@yelp.com',subject:'Business Claim Request - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  foursquare:{name:'Foursquare',country:'GLOBAL',email:'support@foursquare.com',subject:'Venue Information Update - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  whitepages:{name:'Whitepages',country:'GLOBAL',email:'businesslistings@whitepages.com',subject:'Business Information Update - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  manta:{name:'Manta',country:'GLOBAL',email:'hello@manta.com',subject:'Business Profile Update - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  opentable:{name:'OpenTable',country:'GLOBAL',email:'restaurants@opentable.com',subject:'Restaurant Partnership Inquiry - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  zomato:{name:'Zomato',country:'GLOBAL',email:'restaurant@zomato.com',subject:'Restaurant Listing Request - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  houzz:{name:'Houzz',country:'GLOBAL',email:'pro@houzz.com',subject:'Professional Profile Request - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  angieslist:{name:"Angie's List",country:'GLOBAL',email:'businessowners@angieslist.com',subject:'Service Provider Listing - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  homeadvisor:{name:'HomeAdvisor',country:'GLOBAL',email:'prosupport@homeadvisor.com',subject:'Pro Registration - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  yellowpages:{name:'Yellow Pages',country:'GLOBAL',email:'support@yellowpages.com',subject:'Business Listing Update - {name}',language:'en-US'},
  google:{name:'Google Business Profile',country:'GLOBAL',email:'',subject:'Google Business Profile Sync - {name}',language:'pt-BR'}
};

if (!directories[channel]) {
  return [{ json: { ...data, directory_name: channel, email_to: '', email_subject: '', email_language: 'pt-BR', email_skip: true, email_error: `Directory ${channel} not configured` } }];
}

const dir = directories[channel];
return [{
  json: {
    ...data,
    directory_name: dir.name,
    directory_country: dir.country,
    email_to: dir.email,
    email_subject: dir.subject.replace('{name}', data.name),
    email_language: dir.language,
    email_skip: !dir.email
  }
}];
